stateName: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

authority.department: Labour Department, Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Administration

overview: Union Territory-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu.

rules.title: Review Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the applicable Shops and Establishments legislation is required.

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and notices prescribed under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and abstracts required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with provisions governing working hours, overtime, weekly holidays and leave.

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare and Local Notifications
rules.description: Review labour welfare obligations, local notifications and employer responsibilities applicable within the Union Territory.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of registrations, statutory records, inspections and labour law compliance.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for labour compliance due dates, inspections and renewals.
